procedures.title: Medical Procedures in Kazakhstan
procedures.subtitle: Browse diagnostic, surgical, and wellness procedures across our partner hospitals. Transparent starting prices in USD.
procedures.priceNote: Approximate price converted from KZT. Final cost confirmed after consultation.

form.title: Request Consultation
form.subtitle: Our international medical coordinator will contact you with more information about this procedure, available clinics, and travel options.
form.successMessage: Thank you. Our international medical coordinator will contact you shortly with procedure details and next steps.

executive-checkup.description: Premium multi-day screening with advanced diagnostics and specialist reviews.
